usage: vibe kits [-h] {list,claude-code,opencode,second-brain} ...

positional arguments:
  {list,claude-code,opencode,second-brain}
    list                List available kits
    claude-code         Manage the Claude Code kit
    opencode            Manage the OpenCode kit
    second-brain        Manage the second-brain kit — safe scaffold of vault
                        at VIBE_SECOND_BRAIN_PATH

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
